column3: ["The CAA licensing inspector reviews the crew member's evidenced competency records. ", 'Based on their review, the CAA licensing inspector makes a decision regarding approval or disapproval of the crew member for flight operations. ']
column4: ['The CAA licensing inspector examines all relevant documents to ensure they meet the required qualifications and competencies. ', "If the crew member's records do not meet all required qualifications and competencies, the CAA licensing inspector cannot approve them for flight operations. "]
